dialogos.texto_en: The aquarium was so much fun, wasn't it?
Yeah, we must have seen everything by now...
We ended up coming back here, didn't we?\nThe big tank is really impressive after all.
Yeah... It's amazing that there's a tank big enough\nfor a whale shark to swim in.
The deck where we could look down from above\nwas also great. It had a different kind of impact\nthan looking from the side.
Then again, the Aqua Room,\nwhere we could watch from below, was so nice.\nBeing able to just sit and watch was so relaxing.
Also, I was happy to be able to snuggle up to you,\nFutaro.
You were actually looking at the fish, right?
Of course I was.
(Actually, I was more conscious of my arm\n that was touching Futaro.)
It's about time, isn't it?
Huh?
(Is Futaro looking at a...clock?)
Is there some event you want to see?\nI'll go with you.
No, that's not it.
Nino, I'm gonna leave here first.\nCome to the entrance of the park in a while.
That's fine...
Sorry. See you soon.
(I wonder what he's planning?\n Is he going to prepare something?)
(Could it be that he's planning a surprise?)
(I mean, just spending a day together\n is already enough, what else does he have in mind?!)
(That's so troublesome!\n It's troublesome, but%p-2;――%p;)
(I'm happy.\n Futaro is doing something just for me...)
